phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale della chiesa, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-soh preen-chee-PAH-leh DEL-lah KYEH-zah, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: From the square side, central door.
responses.phonetic: DAHL LAH-toh DEHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah POHR-tah chehnt-RAH-leh
responses.local: Dal lato della piazza, porta centrale.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare fotografie all'interno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh see POHSS-soh-noh FAH-reh foh-toh-GRAH-fee-eh ahl-in-TEH-ree-or-oh pehr fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Yes, without flash. No during masses.
responses.phonetic: SÌ SEHN-tsah FLAHS NOH doo-RAHN-teh MEH-sseh
responses.local: Sì, senza flash. No durante messe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the basilica was built and why
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quando e perché fu costruita la Salute?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-doh eh per-KEH foo kos-TWEE-tah lah sah-LOO-teh?
phrases.cultural_note: Santa Maria della Salute was built from 1631 as a votive church, thanking the Virgin Mary for the end of a devastating plague that killed 80,000 Venetians.

responses.english: In 1631, as a vow for the end of the plague.
responses.phonetic: nel meel-SEH-een-toh-tren-TOO-noh, KOH-meh VOH-toh per lah FEE-neh DEL-lah PES-teh.
responses.local: Nel 1631, come voto per la fine della peste.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which vaporetto stop is closest
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale fermata del vaporetto è più vicina alla Salute?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh fer-MAH-tah del vah-poh-RET-toh eh PYOO vee-CHEE-nah AL-lah sah-LOO-teh?

responses.english: Salute, line one, right here opposite.
responses.phonetic: sah-LOO-teh, LEE-neh-ah OO-noh, PROH-pryoh kwee dee FRON-teh.
responses.local: Salute, linea uno, proprio qui di fronte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if entry to the basilica is free
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, l'ingresso alla basilica è gratuito?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, leen-GRES-soh AL-lah bah-ZEE-lee-kah eh grah-TWEE-toh?

responses.english: Yes, the church is free, the sacristy has a charge.
responses.phonetic: see, lah KYEH-zah eh grah-TWEE-tah, lah sah-GRES-tyah eh ah pah-gah-MEN-toh.
responses.local: Sì, la chiesa è gratuita, la sagrestia è a pagamento.
